observations.interpretation: Ore reserves declining steadily — refinery consumption outpacing single-ship mining output
Slag accumulation driving storage toward saturation; jettison or export needed
2 of 3 refineries consistently starved — fleet cannot keep up with processing capacity

bottlenecks.description: Single mining ship cannot supply 3 refineries. 2880-tick transit time creates chronic ore gaps.
Slag accumulation at ~0.3 kg/run with no jettison or export strategy.

parameter_changes.rationale: Halving transit time to test whether ore starvation resolves with faster fleet turnaround

strategy_notes: Single ship fleet causes chronic ore starvation during 2880-tick transit periods — need 2+ mining ships or faster transit
Slag management becomes critical around tick 3500 with 3 active refineries — autopilot should prioritize jettison or export
Refinery count should match fleet mining throughput, not just available ore — over-provisioning refineries wastes power
